pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime targeting.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve potential classpath issues during migration.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock standalone dependency for service virtualization in tests.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing with specific configuration and exclusions.
Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing with specific environment variable activation.
Add a new Maven profile for running with WireMock enabled via environment variable.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and organized sections for better readability and maintenance.
Update JaCoCo plugin exclusions to match new package structure and added classes.
Add explicit configuration for maven-surefire-plugin to fix event transmission issues.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set main class in manifest for executable JARs.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install Node.js using nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Define the specific Java jar execution command to run the application instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy source code, frontend assets, and configuration files into the image for the build step.
